infoDialog.title: Welcome to CAVE!
infoDialog.content:
Master the principles of Clean Architecture through our three interactive modules:

1. Checker Mode: Audit your existing use cases. Upload your logic to visualize how well it aligns with Clean Architecture boundaries and dependency rules.

2. Learning Mode: Explore the core layers. Dive into interactive component descriptions to understand the flow of control and data between Entities, Use Cases, and Adapters.

3. Project Starter: Jumpstart your development. Generate a standardized boilerplate that ensures your new project is built on a solid, scalable foundation from day one.

checker.title: Checker
checker.description: Verify clean architecture consistency in your codebase

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Learn core concepts of clean architecture with our interactive visualizer

starter.title: Project Starter
starter.description: Download clean architecture starter file to get started on your project!
